name: istefox-dt-mcp
description: MCP server for DEVONthink 4 — outcome-oriented tools, RAG-augmented, privacy-first.
long_description: Connettore MCP best-in-class per DEVONthink 4. Sei tool MCP operativi end-to-end: list_databases, search (BM25 + vector + hybrid RRF), find_related, ask_database (vector + BM25 fallback), file_document e bulk_apply (entrambi preview-then-apply con audit log e undo selettivo). RAG locale opzionale via ChromaDB embedded. Tutti i dati restano sulla macchina: nessuna telemetry, embedding generati localmente, audit log SQLite append-only.

fast_list_databases.title: Fast list_databases mode
fast_list_databases.description: Skip recursive record_count when listing databases. Useful on DBs with tens of thousands of records where the first call would otherwise take several seconds. Returns record_count=null. The 5-min cache mitigates the slowdown for repeated calls — enable this only if the cold-cache latency is a problem.

preview_ttl_s.title: Preview token TTL (seconds)
preview_ttl_s.description: Lifetime in seconds for preview_token returned by file_document/bulk_apply dry_run. After this window, the apply call must be re-previewed. Default 300 (5 minutes) is enough for the user to read the preview and confirm; lower it to tighten the safety window, raise it for slow review workflows.

rag_enabled.title: Enable vector search (RAG) — experimental
rag_enabled.description: Activates the embedded ChromaDB vector retrieval for ask_database and search (mode=hybrid). EXPERIMENTAL in 0.1.0: works but the embedding model default is not yet benchmarked cross-corpus (see ADR-008). When enabled, run `istefox-dt-mcp reindex <database>` once per database to populate the index.

rag_model.title: Embedding model
rag_model.description: sentence-transformers model name used by the RAG provider. Default is paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2 (~120MB, 384-dim, multilingual). Override examples: BAAI/bge-m3 (~2.2GB, higher quality), intfloat/multilingual-e5-large. Only used when 'Enable vector search' is on.
